TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APL base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This data element is triggered by a value of “13” (Concurrent 1915(a)/1915(i) Home and Community-
Based Services (HCBS) state plan services) in any instance of MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD.
